needs_you.d: P3' passed both blinded gates (first of the campaign), you authorized the single permitted on-pulse computation, and it found 40-sigma broad spectral structure that is NOT scintillation: amplitude 11x the calibrated ceiling (implied m~0.6), width running off the 400 kHz scan edge, matching the burst's intrinsic spectral envelope. Recorded fail-closed as 'no admissible measurement; scintillation constraint is envelope-confusion-limited'. Ratify that as the manuscript statement, or sanction a P4 envelope-modeling experiment (exploratory-only: the burst spectrum has been seen). Figures: unblind_onpulse_scan.png on FLITS main.

now.d: FLITS #181 merged (563645c) + pin bumped this PR; estimator calibrated (G1''/G2'' PASS), unblinded once with owner authorization; verdict: intrinsic-envelope foreground, no admissible Delta-nu_d

next.d: calibrated N-vs-1 profile model comparison (owner charter at A1 closure); design after control system lands
per the 2026-07-14 decision route; independent of the CHIME question
